title: AI Engineer World's Fair 2026 Day 1: Software Factories & Keynotes
summary: AI Engineer World's Fair 2026 took place on June 30, 2026 at Moscone West in San Francisco. Day 1 featured keynote sessions and main-stage programming on software factories and related topics, livestreamed for online viewers.
writeup: This video is the Day 1 livestream of AI Engineer World's Fair 2026, held June 30, 2026 at Moscone West in San Francisco. It covers keynote sessions and main-stage programming centered on software factories. The recording captures the opening day's talks for viewers following along online.
